product.name: Amazon Basics Large Extended Computer Rectangular Mouse Pad, 16.7 x 35.7 inch, Black
product.description: Product Description               Amazon Basics Large Extended Gaming Computer Mouse Pad - Black                  From the Manufacturer               Amazon Basics
features: Extended gaming mouse pad―ideal for gamers; graphic designers; or anyone who uses a mouse for long sessions
High-quality cloth surface promotes smooth mouse gliding and enhanced precision
Steady; thick; rubberized base keeps mouse pad in place
Machine washable for easy cleaning; large size for optimal gaming; accommodates both a keyboard and mouse
Measures 35.5 x 16.88 x 0.13 inches (90.17 x 42.88 x 0.33 cm)
